overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character wearing a straw mino cape walking through a snowy river in a traditional Japanese mountain village. The scene transitions from muted overcast lighting to dramatic golden hour as the character approaches and crosses a wooden footbridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow riverbed in snowy mountain village

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the shallow river water toward a distant wooden bridge and traditional farmhouses

entered.detail: shallow river with snow-covered banks and clear flowing water
traditional Japanese wooden farmhouse with snow-covered thatched roof
dense evergreen pine trees covering the hillside
wooden footbridge spanning the river in the distance
large boulders dusted with snow along the riverbank
snow-capped mountains visible through the mist in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a shallow snowy river in a mountain village under overcast skies. Traditional thatched farmhouses and a distant wooden bridge are visible ahead, surrounded by snow-covered rocks and pine forests.

scene_state.functional_zone: river approach to wooden bridge at golden hour

events.description: sun breaks through the overcast clouds creating dramatic golden hour lighting with warm orange and yellow hues across the snowy landscape

agents.ego_description: continuing to wade through the river as the lighting shifts to golden hour, approaching the wooden bridge

segments.scene_description: As the character continues through the river, the lighting transforms to golden hour with the sun breaking through clouds. The wooden bridge and farmhouse grow closer and more detailed, bathed in warm sunset light reflecting off the water.

events.description: character exits the river water and steps up onto the wooden bridge deck

agents.ego_description: walking up onto the wooden bridge deck and beginning to cross over the river

entered.detail: dark wooden railings with snow accumulation lining the bridge sides
snow-dusted wooden planks of the bridge walkway underfoot

segments.scene_description: The character steps out of the water onto the wooden bridge, transitioning from the river to the elevated walkway. The bridge railings frame the view as the character crosses over the river now visible below, with the snowy village and golden sunset ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a muted, snowy mountain village that gradually transforms into a radiant golden landscape. It begins with a character wading through a shallow, icy river under overcast skies, surrounded by snow-covered rocks, pine forests, and distant thatched farmhouses. As the character advances, the lighting shifts dramatically to golden hour, with the sun breaking through the clouds to cast warm sunset reflections across the water and illuminate the approaching wooden bridge. The scene then transitions as the character steps out of the river and onto the elevated walkway, where the bridge railings frame a view of the snowy village below. Finally, the camera follows the character across the bridge toward the glowing horizon of the sunset.
